input_text: I persist in studying, yet my mind becomes ineffective, as if the information doesn't penetrate. I repeatedly read the same material, feeling as though it's not being absorbed. This leads to embarrassment when I hesitate to ask questions, as I perceive others grasping the concepts swiftly. Consequently, I remain silent, even when I'm utterly confused. The fear of disappointing my family looms over me as the semester progresses.
I feel bad because they laughed at me while presenting my project

Feeling overwhelmed by the difficulty in retaining information despite intensive study, experiencing self-doubt about asking questions in class, and anxious about fulfilling family expectations for academic achievement.
